title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Momonosuke, Kaido, Nami, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You monsters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey! We've come to see you off!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke! Kin'Emon!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: YAMATO- (I) CHAAAN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: LJFFY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy!! (?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Got you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: JWAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy!! You dastard! What is the meaning of this outrage?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can you abandon the two comrades you have known the longest without a word?!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: You have angered the Shogun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you have to say for yourself?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the big deal? We're meeting now, aren't we?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy... this is an edict from the Shogun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please don't leeabee! It'll be so lonely!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I want to be with you forever!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It can't end like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only managed to survive because you were there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're the reason I can laugh again....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you so much for averaging my father... and my mother!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You see, I can't even express myself properly now!! I'm scared of what happens next...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please don't go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's quite the pitiful sight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cut him a break, he's still a little kid on the inside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: USOP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yeah! It's ready!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Gah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been waiting here all this time 'cause I wanted to give you this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't play the tough shogun with me, momo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you're a bit bigger now, I know what you're like on the inside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're a small, weak dummy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think of you like a little brother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's a flag!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When times are tough, look at it and remember your seafaring adventures!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hang it up somewhere in Wano! If any major bad news comes knockin', just point 'em to it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll let them know that screwing with our friends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Is the same as screwing with us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does that mean I am one of you....?!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
